reason: Independent review returned NEEDS_FOLLOWUP because typecheck was skipped and VAT/reporting UAT/API smoke evidence is missing. The correct next owner is QA, not builder, because no implementation defect is proven yet.
generated_prompt_for_next_agent: You are the QA Agent for Northstar VAT/reporting task NS-VAT-001. Do not edit production code. Work only in the supplied branch/worktree. Verify the current diff against github/main, run npm run typecheck, run the targeted VAT/reporting unit test, and run one focused UAT/API smoke covering the changed VAT reporting path. Stop on secrets, forbidden paths, tenant migration/provisioning inconsistency, or runtime claim without raw evidence. Return an evidence-first report with GATE=PASS|WARN|FAIL.

test failure not attributable to current task
expected_evidence: exact UAT/API smoke request and response summary
